name: Web Activity Tracker
description: Track active browsing time per website and alert when a custom time limit is reached.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self'; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; child-src 'none'; worker-src 'self'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; media-src 'none'; require-trusted-types-for 'script'; trusted-types default;
